texto: ...I just don't think we could ever get our heads around the concept of learning to love a stranger". But you already do, the Indians replied. You didn't choose your siblings, and yet you learned to love them. Your parents shoved you in a room and said, "Get along". And you did. You found the good in each other. You discovered that the more respect, caring, and altruism you added to the relationship, the stronger it grew.
explicacao: Citação de Franz Wisner sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “...I just don't think we could ever get our heads around the concept of learning to love a strang…” articula reflexao, culture, love em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como love.

frase_original: ...I just don't think we could ever get our heads around the concept of learning to love a stranger". But you already do, the Indians replied. You didn't choose your siblings, and yet you learned to love them. Your parents shoved you in a room and said, "Get along". And you did. You found the good in each other. You discovered that the more respect, caring, and altruism you added to the relationship, the stronger it grew.

texto: Concentrate on the goodness in the other, rather than the difference.
explicacao: Citação de Franz Wisner sobre temas ligados a amor. “Concentrate on the goodness in the other, rather than the difference.” articula amor, culture, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como love.
